Title: Bell, Quentin
Overview: Artist, author and Professor of the History and Theory of Art at the University of Sussex from 1967 to 1975. Son of Clive Bell and nephew of Virginia Woolf. His papers are housed at the University of Sussex.
Archives:
• Quentin Bell Family Letters to Alexander and Jeanne Jeffares, New York Public Library. http://archives.nypl.org/brg/24036.
  • Quentin Bell Papers, University of Sussex Special Collections. https://archiveshub.jisc.ac.uk/data/gb181-sxms74, GB 181 SxMs 74.
